templates.name: Squeeze Page Funnel
templates.script: Curiosity-Gap Headline formula + the compressed 'Hook' of Hook-Story-Offer (story and offer are deferred to the follow-up).

templates.name: Reverse Squeeze Page Funnel
templates.script: Epiphany Bridge delivered IN the free content (so the viewer adopts the new belief), followed by a StoryBrand transitional Call-to-Action to opt in for more.

templates.name: Lead Magnet Funnel
templates.script: Hook-Story-Offer (DotCom Secrets) wrapped around Jim Edwards' fascination-bullet formula for the 'what's inside' section.

templates.name: Bridge Funnel
templates.script: Epiphany Bridge Script (Expert Secrets) - the canonical home of the Epiphany Bridge.

templates.name: Survey / Quiz Funnel
templates.script: Survey funnel mechanics (DotCom Secrets) - a micro-commitment ladder - with the results page using the StoryBrand Plan > Call-to-Action for the matched segment.

templates.name: Ask Campaign Funnel
templates.script: Single open-ended question with deliberately minimal copy so answers stay unbiased. No selling on Page 1 (exploratory voice rooted in the Ask method).

templates.name: Application Funnel
templates.script: Page-1 VSL = a condensed Perfect Webinar (Big Domino + proof + take-away CTA). Credibility story uses Star/Story/Solution. The call uses a setter-then-closer phone script.

templates.name: Hero Funnel
templates.script: The Attractive Character (DotCom Secrets: backstory, parables, character flaws, polarizing stances) told as an Epiphany Bridge (Expert Secrets); StoryBrand framing positions you as the Guide who was once the hero.

templates.name: Homepage Funnel
templates.script: StoryBrand SB7 BrandScript mapped to the StoryBrand homepage wireframe; supported by Brunson's Funnel Hub concept.
